I had the same issue, and had forgotten to change the application id in manifest.json. So that's what solved my issue at least.

I had the same issue, and had forgotten to change the application id in manifest.json. So that's what solved my issue at least.

entry.title: SAP UI5 How to get data using external barcode reader
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a UI5 applications that runs in a computer with 4 input fields and I am using a external barcode reader (2D scanner) to scan all the inputs from a label , How do I populate the scanned data to the particular field in UI5?

Currently I am not planning to use the Camera on the device to read the barcodes.

Thanks,

Vinodkumar.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: Hi @David_Chaviano ! My name is Luciana, I'm 43 years old and I've been a SAP Consultant for two years. I haven't found my first job opportunity yet, but I'm paying attention to every step and I think certification would be a differentiator. Unfortunately, most of the vacancies I find ask for years and years of experience. Furthermore, I am the creator of a group of Latina women, MeninasdoSAP, which, free of charge, empowers Latina women and encourages them to enter the SAP career, offering the basic fundamentals of SAP so that they can begin their studies.

entry.title: Re: Accessing Production Data in QA Environment
entry.content:
I am a trainee, they just asked me to investigate 🙂
Thank you very much for your help.

entry.title: Why Supply Chain Is The Catalyst For Growing Companies
entry.content:
“Nearly 75% of midsize business owners say they plan to expand their businesses, and the vast majority (90%) are implementing digital strategies to better achieve that growth”.

This was a major finding of a recent Industry Week White Paper, which went on to say that “to achieve these numbers and potentially outperform competitors, manufacturers need to focus on supply chain excellence”.

The white paper identified 3 best practices for achieving this supply chain excellence:

  • Automation and AI for agility
  • Efficient operations for resiliency
  • Increased visibility for customer centricity

Automation and AI for agility

In today’s business environment the pace of change, customer expectations, and supply chain complexity are at never-before-seen levels. And companies are looking to address these challenges in the face of growing regulations, sustainability mandates and employee shortages.

To keep up with the pace of these challenges and still grow, many companies are looking to advanced automation and AI And to do so.  

Efficient operations for resiliency

Resiliency has been top of mind for companies of all sizes since the start of the pandemic in 2020. And it seems like we have had business disruption after disruption ever since. So much so that permacrisis was the Colins Dictionary word of the year for 2022.

Companies have prioritized investments in risk-resiliency strategies such as identifying alternate sourcing strategies, driving inventory optimization processes, improving visibility and collaboration with business partners, and digitizing end to end processes.

Increased visibility for customer centricity

The white paper references a recent Oxford Economics Study that highlighted that “companies are struggling to maintain the quality of their products and services while at the same time increasing the speed of interactions with customers”. The study stated that Real-time responsiveness is their top barrier to supply chain success, cited by 40% of respondents, followed by meeting customer demands on time (34%).

It is clear from the paper that the more “customer centric” a company becomes, the better they are at meeting their customers’ requirements.

It is also clear that regardless of the business challenge, increased visibility and transparency of the situation enables you to identify and even predict risks and opportunities and be in a position to respond in a timely manner.   

To learn more, download the Industry Week White Paper – Three Milestones That Put Midsize Manufacturers on the Path to Supply Chain Excellence.

entry.title: Re: SAP Managed Tags Links Don't Work on SAP Community
entry.content:
Hello Tuncay,

This issue was already alerted in this post:
https://community.sap.com/t5/questions-about-sap-websites/bug-blog-shows-up-under-untagged-tag/qaq-p/13650682#M52971

Please follow that post, as we will be providing updates there.

Regards,
Audrey

entry.title: Re: SAP SAC Planning Drop down / Input help Query
entry.content:
@zebashah 

The new Optimized stories offer scripting capabilities and should be the preferred option  for building reports and planning forms. There are standard Input controls option available which offer filter selection capabilities on model dimensions without any scripts required. If you need a custom dropdown to offer selection on values other then dimensions you can use the dropdown widget and script the selection behavior.

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: digital skills initiative
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am a Canadian military veteran looking to increase my skills for future employment. I just completed a Business Administration - Management Diploma. Any advice for a beginning beginner would be greatly appreciated. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Data Load to SAC for SuccessFactor for FTE Planning
entry.content:
@zebashah 

Try building SF query on Job classification API

Select the API objects in Employee Central (EC)Job Classification. Choose Next. Then select data.

Select fields of your choice

Also, you can start with WF Planning Standard content which can offer lot of initial help.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/42093f14b43c485fbe3adbbe81eff6c8/7032f23e00b34a7ab6d79af20a8792a7.html

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Upgrading to Latest Goal Management – Cycle Planning & Preparedness – Best Practice Approach
entry.content:
@VanessaLi , 

Hi Vanessa,  

For Scenario 1, you listed below steps:

Finish off the 2023 goal cycle in legacy goals
Upgrade to latest version of goals
Create a new template for 2024 goal plan
Done!

I have question on "Create a new template for 2024 goal plan". If I use "Save As" option to copy 2023 goal template and save as 2024 goal template. Do I need to covert this 2024 goal template for users to use it in the latest goal version? 

Please advise. 

Thank you!

Yuching

entry.title: Problem when uploading SAP HANA Readiness Check
entry.content:
SAPSupport

We are creating the SAP HANA Readiness Check for a Customer but we have the following message when upload the File .ZIP to the portal.

  • The analysis has failed. Please try again.
  • The uploaded file is invalid. Verify that the file has been downloaded using the SAP Readiness Check data collector report.

All Jobs finished completly

I ran the program several times more, but when I upload the file the message is the same.

Some one got the same result???  

How can I fix this issue??

Can you Help me please??

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: $crossjoin queries with $inlinecount
entry.content:
How do I combine the $inlinecount query option with $crossjoin in oData queries??

I have tried the following $crossjoin query query: 

https://200.7.150.206:50000/b1s/v2/$crossjoin(IncomingPayments,Invoices,Orders)?$expand=IncomingPayments($select=DocEntry,CardCode,CashSum,DocDate,U_invoice_id),Invoices($select=DocEntry,CardCode,DocDate,DocTotal,U_order_id),Orders($select=CardCode,DocDate,DocTotal,DocEntry)&$filter=IncomingPayments/U_invoice_id eq Invoices/DocEntry and Invoices/U_order_id eq Orders/DocEntry and Invoices/CardCode eq 'FB_MEE'&$inlinecount=allpages

But it returns data in the form:

{
 "@odata.context": "$metadata#Collection(Edm.ComplexType)",
 "value": [{}]
}

Notice I added $inlinecount=allpages to the query.

Whereas if I were to try the following query: 

https://200.7.150.206:50000/b1s/v2/Orders?$inlinecount=allpages&$orderby=DocNum desc

I get data in the following form:

{
 "@odata.count": "26913",
 "@odata.context": "https://200.7.150.206:50000/b1s/v2/$metadata#Orders",
 "value": [{}],
 "@odata.nextLink": "Orders? 
 $inlinecount=allpages&$orderby=DocNum%20desc&$skip=20"
}

The "@odata.count" is also what I want to access when making the $crossjoin query.

entry.title: Przedświąteczne spotkanie Katowickiej Grupy SAP Community
entry.content:
Za nami już trzeci SAP Stammtisch w 2024 roku!

Po raz trzeci w tym roku dopisała frekwencja i można śmiało zaliczyć spotkanie grupy SAP Community Katowice do bardzo udanych 👍 🔥 🍻

Jak zawsze w wyśmienitym towarzystwie, tym razem w całkowicie wszystkim sobie znanym, mogliśmy w luźnej atmosferze porozmawiać o interesujących nas tematach. 

Tak jak ustaliliśmy wcześniej, następne spotkanie już za miesiąc, 24 kwietnia. Zapisy pomogą w rezerwacji odpowiedniej wielkości stolika, więc daj znać, że będziesz: katowice-sap-stammtisch-24-04

Widzimy się jak zawsze o tej samej porze i w tym samym miejscu, więc jeżeli nie udało Ci się dotrzeć dziś, wpadnij następnym razem!

Korzystając z okazji, życzymy Wszystkim czytającym ten post, Wesołych Świąt Wielkanocnych i smacznego Mazurka 😉

entry.title: SAP Cloud Integration - Trading Partner Management - OData to EDI Interface (ProcessDirect)
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

In previous blog we saw step by step demonstration of SCI - TPM - AS2 to IDoc Interface .

In this blog we will see demonstration of how to use ProcessDirect adapter to create wrappter IFlow. TPM supported adapters are AS2, AS2 MDN, SOAP 1.x, IDoc and wrapper IFlow is required when data is expected from any other communication protocol e.g. SFTP.

For this artical we will create wrapper IFlow to fetch data from S4 via OData call and pass information to TPM via ProcessDirect adapter, execute B2B scenario to post data to target system. I am using ProcessDirect at target side to park payload at end of process.

1. Sender HTTP Adapter used to trigger IFlow, this can be adjusted as Timer also

2. Content Modifier to set APIKey as Header, for real scenario use security material to store details

3. Request-Reply - Odata adapter to fetch data from S4 API /A_PurchaseOrder

I am using SAP Sandbox to fetch data, below are the details -

Address - https://sandbox.api.sap.com/s4hanacloud/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV

Processing Details -

Data transformed from OData to SOAP format using Integration Advisor as my TPM is based on system configurations as SOAP and AS2. 

4. Content Modifier - Set Adapter - Message Header

SAP_COM_SND_Adapter_Type = Process_Direct

SAP_COM_SND_If_Message_Header = boolean(//*:MessageHeader[1]/*:RecipientParty[1]/*:InternalID[1])

SAP_EDI_Document_Standard = SAP_S4HANA_Cloud_SOA

4. Process Direct Adapter address = /tpm/b2b/processdirect

Sequence of IFlow execution is as below (Step IFlow from std package of SCI - TPM) -

Wrapper IFlow --> Step 1 --> Step 1b --> Step 2 --> Step 3 --> Wrapper IFlow

I am using same company and tranding partner profile from previous blog and creating new aggrement template where initiator is company with one way communication. B2B scenario with communication Channel Name - Sender Process Direct and Interchange -

Type System = SAP S/4HANA Cloud SOAP
Message Type = OrderRequest
MAG details from IA as SOAP to 850 mapping details.
 
B2B Scenario - 
 
SOAP Payload (dummy data) from Step 1 - 
 
Step 1b - will read PD data (PD Lookup - Communication Sender) and read interchanged header data from TPM
 
Step 2 - Read data from JMS - SAP_TPM_INBOUND_Q and execute Sender to Receiver Interchange logic and store in JMS - SAP_TPM_OUTBOUND_Q
 
Step 3 - Read data from JMS - SAP_TPM_OUTBOUND_Q and set receiver wrapper IFlow using property - ${property.SAP_PROCESS_DIRECT_REC_Address}
 
Receiver wrapper IFlow - I'm using Mail adapter to park the EDI message
 
B2B Message Monitor - 
 
Hope this gives broader level of insight on how to setup TPM - B2B interface using Process Direct Adapter.
 

References :- 

https://api.sap.com/package/CloudIntegrationTradingPartnerManagement/integrationflow

https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/getting-started-with-b2b-scenarios...

https://api.sap.com/package/ICAPrepackagedContent/integrationflow

#HappyLearning

 
- Rashmi

entry.title: Re: SharePoint Lists into DataSphere
entry.content:
Hi Martin,

OpenConnectors runs on Cloud Elements.  I saw this message from Cloud Elements after the purchase by UiPath and reached out to my SAP Account rep for confirmation.

https://docs.cloud-elements.com/home/cloud-elements-end-of-life-announcement

Regarding this being so difficult, I understand that SAP intends to address SharePoint list integration to make it easier.  I just needed a solution for a DataSphere project now and had to get creative.  I will happily cut all this out when SAP releases a better option.

entry.title: Is GMPS status mandatory for Work Order settlement if there are no operation confirmations?
entry.content:
Hi,

I read in one of the articles that GMPS status in Work Order does not appear upon upgrading to S/4HANA 2020 onwards from 1909 version.
I recently encountered this scenario having to worked both the 1909 and 2022 versions at two different clients and was surprised to see that all Orders in 1909 version had GMPS status when goods were issued against Order. At other client who moved onto S/4 HANA 2022 version, the GMPS status was not appearing for any Order since their upgrade from 1909. 

My concern: I am not able to settle any order in 2022 version using tcode KO88 for Order against which issuance has been made (Movement Type 261) and its status doesn't have GMPS in it.

Upon running KO88 for same Order it says that "there is nothing to settle or already settled", though i made issuance against same order.

Now my question is whether GMPS status is mandatory for Work Orders to be settled? Also how to get this status?

Regards

Faisal

entry.title: Re: Understanding Consolidation of Investment (COI) in SAP S/4HANA Finance for group reporting – Par
entry.content:
Thank for the reply. The first approach regarding loading data with first consolidation date after divestiture date is literally impossible due to the fact Divestiture date cannot be accepted by the system if it is before first consolidation. In fact, Manage Group structure cannot be set up  since divesture must be perform after first consolidation. However, an interesting  scenario that I think  might work is to set Manage group structure normally as it suppose to with the divestiture date after first consolidation . Since I am doing ABC method I would upload my control date with act type 11 and specify cons unit. I would run Manage Group Change task instead COI.and keep it that way.

Thank

entry.content:
hello, mjrussell09,

did you find anything to solve yr problem? I have the same issue here (S/4 Hana OP 2021).

Thank you,

Patricia.

entry.title: Basic Data Text Partially Appearing on Order Acknowledgements
entry.content:
Hello community!  I hope I posted this in the right place...

There are countless materials in which a portion of the Basic Data Text field in MM03 is printing below the Material info on Order Acknowledgements. 

I could use some insights/information to present to our Materials Master so that these records can be updated, and the text removed from the OAs.  I have previously asked for this to be investigated and corrected, but no one seemed to know how to do this, or WHY this was occurring in the first place...

Attached are three examples that show the specific line of text in the Text field and on the OA.  I thought maybe text on a specific line was printing to the OAs but that does not seem to be the case; the line#s are not present in the attached screenshots, but I went back and checked and they are not the same line#s but close! :

#1 - "been booked. 12/29/2017 MCUELLA" - LINE 13 of 43 
#2 - "500000067652 alpha rev 9-6-2016 sls" - LINE 14 of 14
#3 - "correction effective 01/25/2016. There is a quote, #2" - LINE 14 of 36

Can anyone make sense of how/why this is happening?  Thank so much!

entry.title: Re: Basic Data Text Partially Appearing on Order Acknowledgements
entry.content: Most probably you have a custom form for acknowledgements and some logic within is resulting in these values being displayed. Someone would need to review the form layout to determine the root cause.

entry.title: Re: Przedświąteczne spotkanie Katowickiej Grupy SAP Community
entry.content: Fajnie

entry.title: 🇷🇴 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA (Timisoara, RO)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

You'll become acquainted with how embedded Machine Learning in SAP HANA can be used to build ML models. In working through this CodeJam you'll also become familiar with how the SAP Business Application Studio can be used to work with Jupyter notebooks.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Wednesday, April 17th in Timișoara, Romania 🇷🇴 from 10:00 to 16:00 EET (UTC+2). The language of the event and the content will be in English. The instructor is a Developer Advocate Vitaliy Rudnytskiy.

There are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/hana-ml-py-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

The event is being hosted by the Department of Computer and Information Technology of Politehnica University of Timisoara at
2, Vasile Pârvan Bvd.,
300223, Timisoara, Romania

Note that spaces are limited: we can only accommodate 20 attendees.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.content:
Hi,

 

you talk about an ALV grid or where are you displaying it?

Have you tried to change the data type to DEC? What data type are you using?

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: In the UI5 Sample App "Single Planning Calendar" How Do I Set the Default View?
entry.content:
I downloaded the Single Planning Calendar sample app from the UI5 Demo Kit and I would like to have the default view be the Month.  I've been trying to figure out how to set the view using setKey() but I'm not sure where to do that.

I've been looking at the code for a few hours and I can't even figure out how the app changes it by clicking the different buttons.

In the Page.view.xml file I see this code in the <view> section:

<SinglePlanningCalendarDayView key="DayView" title="Day" />
<SinglePlanningCalendarWorkWeekView key="WorkWeekView" title="Work Week" />
<SinglePlanningCalendarWeekView key="WeekView" title="Week" />
 <SinglePlanningCalendarMonthView key="MonthView" title="Month" />
 
I tried commenting out the first 3 views but it still defaulted to the first one.

Any ideas and/or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

Cheers!

Ron

entry.title: Transfer Purchase Requisitions as FORECAST from S4 to IBP Time Series Planning Area Key Figure
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirment to transfer Purchase Requisitions as Forecast from S4 to IBP Time-Series Planning Area custom Key Figure. Can someone explain me in layman terms, what is the process or approach i should follow to transfer purchase requisition created in S4 as forecast in IBP. Do we need to create/develop new extractors? Any existing BadI and Functional module that can be used in S4 for this purpose. I really appreciate, if you provide detailed explanation since i am not an expert.

Regards, PK09

entry.title: Cost rate for labor & machine activities in Standard Cost are not correct
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

It looks like, Public Cloud SAP version take wrong unit base for calculate the Cost rate for labor and machine activities during the Product costing

Also, it is not considering the variable amounts of these two activities (only fix amounts)

Have you facing this problem?.

Explanation for the Expected Rate:

1 hour of work produces 1,750 KG of the material 33000120

The rate for 1 hour on the activity type – cost center for labor is $294.51 MXN (Fixed = $265.06 + Variable = $29.45)

The rate for 1 hour on the activity type – cost center for machine (tmaqui) is $52.61 MXN (Fixed = $44.72 + Variable = $7.89)

Produced item has standard cost and the raw material 11000142 is variable and the price at the moment of the cost rate calculation is $10 MXN per KG

The cost rate is calculated for 1 KG of the material 33000120. The expected total is $10.20

Resources

Expected Cost Rate

Expected Calculation

SAP Cost Rate

SAP Calculation

Raw Material 11000142

$10

$10 = 1KG

$10

$10 = 1KG

Labor

$0.17

$294.51 / 1750 KG

$0.05

$265.06 / 1000 KG

Machine (TMAQUI)

$0.03

$52.61 / 1750 KG

$0.29

$44.72 / 1000 KG

 Any of following master data contains the equivalence for 1 hour = 1000 KG, and this is what is causing the first difference between the calculation shown in the system and the expected one.

The second one correspond to the fact that it is only considering the fixed rate, and the variable rate is being excluded.

entry.title: Using both automatic overtime and approved overtime
entry.content:
Hello Expert, 

We have a condition where a group of personnel subarea will work from 08:00-19:00 with 1 hour break. From 17:00-19-00 will automatically be calculated as 150% overtime, after 19:00 the employee would still be able to do more overtime if they make a request for an overtime using IT2007.

I had tried using 2 approaches for this 

1. Using the automatic overtime function on daily work schedule, but it's clashed with IT2007 and not providing overtime pair

2. Using the fixed value on table T510S, it was able to generate the wage type for overtime. But it has the problem that it's applied to all personnel subarea.

Is there a way to make the fixed value on T510S only apply to certain personnel subarea?

Help would be really appreciated.

Thank you,

Kelvin

entry.title: Re: Query - Can we record a simulation spanning SAP and B...
entry.content:
Hi Amrita,

Yes, it is possible to record Simulations that span applications.  At the point that you switch from one application to the next, the recording Profile should change to the relevant Profile for the SAP application, but that should occur automatically.  If it does not, it is likely that your Authoring Settings need adjustment.  Please ensure that that your settings allow the Profile to change when recording across applications.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: SAP 分析云 2024.05 版新功能抢先看
entry.content:
SAP 分析云是一款先进的商务分析云解决方案，集商业智能 (BI)、增强分析、预测分析和企业规划功能于一体，消除单点解决方案和数据孤岛挑战，能提供您需要的全面云分析功能。

本文介绍了 SAP 分析云 2024.05 版本的新功能。这些新功能已经在 SAP 分析云 FastTrack 客户的系统上线。对于 SAP 分析云季度发布周期 (QRC) 客户，此版本及其功能将作为 QRC 2024 年第2季度版本的一部分提供。这里可以查看 QRC 发布时间表。

系统和技术要求

尽管不是必需的，我们推荐您升级到最新的 SAP 分析云代理版本 1.0.397，利用所有数据采集类型。

除以下情况外，您的代理需要1.0.75或以上版本：

  • SAP ERP/SQL 数据库版本1.0.99
  • SAP Universe (UNX)版本1.0.365（ SAP分析云代理需要额外的设置步骤，有关详细信息，请参阅 SAP 说明3262098）
  • SAP Business Warehouse (BW)版本1.0.353
  • SAP HANA View版本1.0.235
  • File Server版本1.0.248

更多详细信息，请参阅系统要求和技术先决条件。

有关将 SAP BW 与 SAP 分析云集成的受支持功能和所需更新，请参阅 SAP Note 2541557 以了解更多详细信息。

有关通过 SAP BusinessObjects Live Data Connect 与 SAP 分析云来实时访问 Universe 时的受支持功能和所需更新，请参阅 SAP Note 2771921 以了解更多详细信息。

请从“Service Marketplace”下载最新版本的“简易部署工具箱”。

  • 为避免下载旧版本并可能让用户面对 Cloud Connector 与 SAPJVM 或 Apache Tomcat 的绑定不当带来的漏洞，只有三个最新版本可供下载。

关于云代理的版本变更管理细节，请参考 SAP Note 3264839。
 

更新亮点

  • 系统与服务管理
    • 文件资源库的备份到期设置  |（SAP路线图浏览器）
  • 数据发掘
    • 增强了设置变量的对话框 |（SAP路线图浏览器）
  • Microsoft Office集成
    • Microsoft Excel的SAC插件
      • 启动对话框中新增最近使用列表
      • 自定义函数：GETVARIABLES
      • 支持SAP BW和SAP S/4HANA的实时模型
  • 故事设计
    • 精简查看器的增量更新
  • 故事拓展性
    • 增强将所有表内容导出到Excel的功能

 

系统与服务管理

文件资源库的备份到期设置

模型备份在文件资源库中存储超过90天后会过期。过期的文件可在文件资源库的已删除文件夹中找到，默认保持30天后会被系统永久删除。自动清理备份文件减少了基本数据管理的工作量。（SAP路线图浏览器）

 

 

 

数据发掘

增强了设置变量的对话框

我们对设置变量的对话框作了增强，改进了功能和可用性：（SAP路线图浏览器）

  • 全新的紧凑式和响应式设计
  • 全新的设置面板，可配置变量值的文本展示方式（ID、描述或IP和描述两者一起）
  • 改进了多选变量的交互和可读性
  • 单项选择在输入字段中展现为可编辑文本

 

 

Microsoft Office集成 - Microsoft Excel的SAC插件

启动对话框中新增最近使用列表 

“选择数据源”对话框现在包含最近列表的“最近使用的数据源”，其中包含你在此租户和设备中使用的最后十个数据源。数据源可以来自不同的连接类型。

此外，我们现在按照类型来给连接分组，例如SAP Datasphere或SAP S/4 HANA系统，你可以在其中选择相应的数据源。

自2024年2月28日起，所有客户都可以使用此功能。

 

自定义函数：GETVARIABLES

我们引入了新的自定义函数SAP.GETVARIABLES。此函数可用于检索数据源的变量值。

参数：

  • 模型ID/数据源
  • 变量（可选）
  • 显示变量（0=ID，1=描述）（可选）
  • 显示值（0=ID，1=描述）（可选）
  • 布局（单独单元格、单个单元格等）（可选）
  • 方向（0=垂直，1=水平）（可选）

自2024年2月28日起，所有客户都可以使用此功能。

 

 支持 SAP BW 和 SAP S/4HANA 的实时模型

除了实时连接外，适用于Microsoft Excel的SAP分析云插件现在还支持SAP BW和SAP S/4 HANA中的实时模型。

自2024年2月28日起，所有客户都可以使用此功能。

 

故事设计

精简查看器的增量更新

精简查看器现在支持以下功能，且不会重定向到完整的应用：

  • 通过统计图、表来启动数据分析器
  • 地理可视化对象 - 热图层
  • 当被导出成PDF的故事中使用地理可视化对象时，pdf中将不会显示占位微件

 

故事拓展性

增强将所有表内容导出到Excel的功能

除了“观点”之外，用户现在还可以选择“全部”作为范围，以将表的所有数据导出到XLSX文件。

 



本文仅提供 SAP 分析云的最新功能和增强功能的高级概述。您可以在针对FastTrack客户的应用内帮助指南中找到有关这些功能的更多详细信息，如果您想了解更多关于FastTrack和季度发布周期发布的信息，请参阅这篇SAP知识库文章。

entry.title: Public Holiday will automatically deduct absence quota
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We have a condition where in a holiday calendar there will some public holiday for mass leave (Example on 13th march and 15th may), in the beginning of the year the employee will get 12 absence quotas.  The client want the absence quota to be automatically deducted by those 2 mass leaves on 1st January. I know we can create a record on IT2001 for future date that will deduct IT2006, but is there a way to deduct IT2006 just from looking at the public holiday without creating any IT2001 record?

Thank you,

Kelvin

entry.title: Re: Guided Tours tab not visible to learners
entry.content:
Hi Mani,

My guess is it's an issue with user authentication, but I can see that they can see other content so it is probably not that, or the Guided Tours are not correctly published.  Try opening Manager and clicking on a Guided Tour in Manager.  Then unpublish the selected Tour and republish it. 

I don't think that there is an issue with your configuration because you say that authors can see the Guided Tours.

If that doesn't work, raise a ticket using the Component ID LM-SEN-CMP and get support to take a look.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: import com.hybris.cockpitng cannot be resolved - back...
entry.content:
Is the class you're depending on found within a ".../web/src" folder?

If so, make sure your class in your custom backoffice extension is also within its "yourbackoffice/web/src" folder - and not just within "yourbackoffice/src".

Recall that "extension/web/src/**" classes can access "extension/src/**" classes - but not the other way around.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: Hi, my name is Dung. I am a Business analyst. I currently work in the ERP field and looking for opportunities to improve skill. I look forward to participating in this initiative and hope that I can make an impact on learning for many organizations.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps for SAP Business One, the next-gen Development Environment
entry.content:
Hi

We have used our demo environment to connect and develop apps, (static IP:50000/b1s/v2/) 

Configuration of Odata Integration works fine with our ip, and when we design the Login Page as per the documentation of the hands on training, in the preview app, the login goes through even though the user id or password is set to random, we are not able to find out weather the login url is being called and passing the credentials including the CompanyDB

Please help

entry.title: Re: SAP NW JAVA Support Tool
entry.content:
Hello, is it possible to make NWJavaSupportTool.jar work with a free and fully patched version of Java please?

The new patched versions of Oracle JRE 8 require license fee's.

We would be happy to use Open JDK or Oracle JDK 21.

Thanks for your time.

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 4
entry.content:
This one was little complex over the previous weeks. After playing around with https://tutorials.solace.dev/nodejs/publish-subscribe/ , i finally looked at the topicpublisher.js and topicsubscriber.js on github. I was a breeze from then. I must admit,  I am learning node.js and writing good code has been a challenge. Time to learn from other's code samples.

hashcode: 758935ea-3f3b-4cd6-8fc7-8636580a10c6

Source code is too long.

Tag @PeterSpielvogel 

Thanks for sharing SP18 details, Please check if you could guide here on one of the very useful feature from persona to specially in EWM RF sap where we could see all available field on screen regardless of the transaction data used to render the screen, it will help designing screen to handle all type of data and scenario. 

I am trying to follow the steps from upgrade document but it's not working, there is not much deatils mention in SAP document, it will greatly benefit me as well as other users from EWM community if we get more details on how to enable and use it.  

I posted below in SAP Screen person forum but couldn't get any help. 

How to enable design mode on a desktop to adjust R... - SAP Community

Appreciate your help. 

Thanks

RD

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoicing in Malaysia
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

Are you planning to have a pre- workshop for Malaysia E-invoice To-be solution ?

As we are all aware that SAP solution will come pretty late and we will have very little time to implement and perform all the testing. So! we need to understand, what is the proposed solution and which scenarios are not covered, so that we can at least plan for a customized solution.

Thanks!

entry.title: How to use API to change the date/time of production order operations independently
entry.content:
How to use API to change the data/time of production order operations independently without rescheduling other operations. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to use API to change the date/time of production...
entry.content:
Use API like below to dispatch/schedule the other operations(e.g. 0010) to set status to DSPT.
/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV/ScheduleProductionOrderOperation?ManufacturingOrder='1004081'&OrderInternalBillOfOperations='4082'&OrderIntBillOfOperationsItem='1'&OpSchedldStartDate=datetime'2024-04-21T00:00:00'&OpSchedldStartTime=time'PT09H00M00S'&OpSchedulingMode='F'&OpSchedulingStatus='DISP'&OpSchedulingStrategy='M'

Then use API to change the date/time of the operation e.g. 0020.
/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PRODUCTION_ORDER_2_SRV/ScheduleProductionOrderOperation?ManufacturingOrder='1004081'&OrderInternalBillOfOperations='4082'&OrderIntBillOfOperationsItem='2'&OpSchedldStartDate=datetime'2024-04-27T00:00:00'&OpSchedldStartTime=time'PT09H00M00S'&OpSchedulingMode='F'&OpSchedulingStrategy='M'

Online help : https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d35113ee62644d3abee1aaec148291d9/57edf397e1f14f999a857593cfc7483c.html

entry.title: Re: Hide the Currency of a Pricing Condition
entry.content: Thank you. Will have it checked by our Security team

entry.title: Re: Issues while getting the Warning messages using FM - 'MRM_SRM_INVOICE_SIM'
entry.content:
Hi,

Same issue we are facing, have you got solution. Please suggest.

entry.title: Questions about the SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA Upgrade to 2023
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

We are planning to upgrade our current release of SAP S4HANA DIGITS FPS02 to SAP S4HANA DIGITS FPS01 in the 3rd quarter. Can you please help us with the following points:

  • SAP Readiness Check Tool for upgrade - What notes to we need to implements and what are the instructions to run the Tool?
  • Simplification Item Check - How do we run the checks and validate what will be affected with the current functionality of our environment
  • Sandbox Environment with a Copy of Production - What is the procedure to create a Sandbox Environment and run the Upgrade?

Thanks and looking forward to hearing from you,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Questions about the SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HA...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

Please have a look at SAP Note 3059197 - SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA upgrades. This overview note contains the required notes to be reviewed or applied to enable the different checks in the SAP Readiness Check Tool.

After prepared the tool, by running the RC_COLLECT_ANALYSIS_DATA report, a ZIP file will be generated with the following name: S4RCAnalysisData<SID><DATE> (RC2AnalysisData<SID><DATE>), which can be uploaded to the could application (https://me.sap.com/readinesscheck) to give you the report for next steps. 

If you cannot use the production system, you can also use a copy of the production system with a few additional steps as outlined in SAP Note 2568736. Or for how to do the system copy, also see Note 1875778 - Performance Optimization for System Copy Procedures. 

The other suggested blogs:
SAP Readiness Check - How to Update Your Implemen... - SAP Community
SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA - Note Analyze... - SAP Community

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: S_DEVELOP and S_RFC Auth Objects
entry.content:
Dear BW Experts,

We are currently migrating the Old BW flows using In-place migration. For performing this, We got one SAP note 2383530 from SAP which has all authorization objects and other details. In the SAP Note, the Authorization Object S_DEVELOP and S_RFC is specified. I just want to know, what are the tasks that will support, while adding the authorization objects S_DEVELOP and S_RFC to the User. I have an idea that, S_DEVELOP auth object is specific to ABAP. But want to know specific tasks related to ABAP.

I also want to know about the Auth object S_RFC. Could you please let me know what are tasks that will allow specific to Auth Object S_RFC.

Link for SAP Note :

2383530

Thanks.

entry.title: Integration of CTMS as part of SAP Cloud ALM and CHARM
entry.content:
Not so long ago I received the question “Can we use CTMS inside of SAP Cloud ALM to do transports for SAP BTP and integrate the process in CHARM?” The answer is “Yes you can do that”. Then the next question was “How do we do that?”. I thought it would have been easy to find the answer in the documentation of SAP but that turned out to be a bigger quest than I had imagined at first so I decided to write this blog and share what I have figured out looking into this.

For those new to CTMS, it stands for “Cloud Transport Management Service” and it’s a service that existed already on SAP BTP in the past. It has been integrated into SAP Cloud ALM as being part of SAP Cloud ALM so right now it’s available outside of SAP Cloud ALM as a separate service and inside of SAP Cloud ALM as part of SAP Cloud ALM.

The CTMS service outside of SAP Cloud ALM and the CTMS service inside of SAP Cloud ALM are identical. So there are no arguments in terms of functionality to go for one or the other. There is one difference however and that’s in the pricing. The SAP Cloud ALM usage rights include an amount of bandwidth GB’s that are otherwise to be paid for if you are using the service outside of SAP Cloud ALM.

In terms of the configuration, there is a difference, meaning that instead of directly approaching the CTMS service, in the case of SAP Cloud ALM, you use the SAP Cloud ALM API instead. If this sound complicated and you think “What on earth is he talking about?!?”. No worries, just continue reading, things will be alright by the time you reach the end of the blog post. If not, there is the comments section of course.

I found blogs online about the integration of CTMS and CHARM but they discuss the CTMS outside of SAP Cloud ALM as part of a SAP BTP tenant in which the CTMS service is active. If you are eligible as a customer to use SAP Cloud ALM it makes sense to leverage CTMS as part of SAP Cloud ALM.

As mentioned already, the integration of CTMS inside of SAP Cloud ALM differs slightly from the CTMS integration outside of SAP Cloud ALM. It’s not necessarily difficult to do however once you know how to do it. I bet that sounds familiar if you’re working in the SAP space.

In general, you follow the steps to set up SAP Cloud ALM as an initial point where to start from. There is however an essential part that can be missed by being quick, during the SAP Cloud ALM API instance creation, you have to enable the transport services if you want to use them later on. So before I’m going into that specific part of establishing communication between CTMS and SAP Solution Manager, we are taking a small detour on the SAP Cloud ALM API instance creation.

SAP Cloud ALM API instance creation

The creation of this API instance is performed on the SAP BTP SAP Cloud ALM subaccount level. You can find the relevant information on the help.sap.com URL:

Enabling SAP Cloud ALM API | SAP Help Portal

The essential part is when you create the SAP Cloud ALM API instance, you have to include a piece of JSON code.

 

Reference: Enabling SAP Cloud ALM API | SAP Help Portal

This part is essential to enable the transport functionality inside of the SAP Cloud ALM API. If the SAP Cloud ALM API was created without this JSON specification, you should be able to update it and include the JSON definition. This didn’t work for me however so I had no other option then to create a new SAP Cloud ALM API instance and include the JSON upon creation. So be careful that you don’t click “next” to quickly and forget to insert this piece of JSON if you want to use the CTMS inside of SAP Cloud ALM.

Reference: Enabling SAP Cloud ALM API | SAP Help Portal

Once you have this in place, you generate a service key for the SAP Cloud ALM API instance that you will use for the on-premise connectivity to SAP Cloud ALM. The information in this key is used for establishing connectivity  for monitoring purposes of on-premise landscapes but it’s also used for the creation of HTTP destinations from SolMan to SAP Cloud ALM CTMS.

Setting up the connectivity for the CTMS usage between SAP Solution Manager and SAP Cloud ALM

Once you are sure the SAP Cloud ALM API instance creation was either done right or redone, you need to set up communication between SAP Solution Manager where your CHARM process runs, typically your productive SAP Solution Manager 7.2 instance and SAP Cloud ALM CTMS.

You’ll need two HTTP based destinations in SAP Solution Manager:

TMS_AUTHENTICATION and TMS_REST_API

You can find a lot of information that is useful in the following blog post:

How to use the integration of SAP Cloud Platform T... - SAP Community

The only thing is that the connections set up there are against CTMS outside of SAP Cloud ALM.

To set these SM59 HTTP destinations up against the CTMS inside of SAP Cloud ALM, we need to use the SAP Cloud ALM API service key information.

Setting up the TMS_AUTHENTICATION destination

 

 

The target host for TMS_AUTHENTICATION should be the value of section UAA and then the value of URL.

https://<domain>.authentication.eu20.hana.ondemand.com

The service no needs the value 443 for HTTPS.

 

In the tab Logon & Security insert the service clientid as user-id and clientsecret as password. Additionally, active SSL.

Setting up the TMS_REST_API HTTP destination

 

The target host should be the value of host of the endpoint API without a path.

Then the path prefix is /api/imp-cdm-transport-management-api/v1 -> you will not find this back in the service key. This is documented in other documentation about setting up a connection within SAP BTP towards the CTMS that is integrated into SAP Cloud ALM.

In my case it was the below but this depends on which region your SAP Cloud ALM is deployed in, in terms of the target host that needs to be used (in my case):

eu20.alm.cloud.sap

443

/api/imp-cdm-transport-management-api/v1

On the Logon & Security tab, do not insert a user. Flag SSL as active.

In retrospect, this makes sense since CTMS is really integrated inside of SAP Cloud ALM and not running as a separate instance when you look at your SAP BTP subaccount.

Other steps involved and needed to set up CHARM can be found in the mentioned blog post(s) and on help.sap.com. You'll need to setup connectivity between CTMS and your SAP BTP tenants ~ destinations are needed for that as well as defining the SAP BTP tenants as CTMS nodes on the SAP BTP side. On SAP Solution Manager, you'll need to define your CTMS nodes are external services in LMDB which have attributes in LMDB that define the connectivity. These things are described in help.sap.com documentation as well as blog posts that are already around hence I'm not re-iterating those steps in detail once more.

entry.title: Re: 'Workflow Pending' - Verify General Journal Entry
entry.content: Hi Aldin

entry.title: Re: 'Workflow Pending' - Verify General Journal Entry
entry.content: Hi Aldin, can you please share the siolution provided by SAP, which table and what entry did they propose to delete.. I am facing the same issue

entry.title: RF screen Next button disappear
DMS(Database Management System) in HANA While trying to upload Document using BAPI. File is not open
entry.content:
Step1- Firstly, there is one Report Program which is created that is ZPM_DMS_AIRDIT.                     

 

Inside this we have called two Function Modules which is-

  1. BAPI_DOCUMENT_CREATE2
  2. CVAPI_DOC_CHECKIN

Here, we are uploading the Document through the Report Program and the same Document we are trying to open in CV03N T-code.

Step2-

 

 

 

While clicking on the F4 we are getting Pop-up for attaching the file from the PC.

 

 

Step3- Once uploading the file from the F4.

 

After executing the Report Program, we are getting the Document Number.

                                        

 

Step4- The same Document Number Once we will execute in the T-code CV03N.

                       

 

Step5-   Once, Opening the above document->

Once we are trying to open the file in Browser it is not opening. The error which is coming is-

The Program is-> 

REPORT zpm_dms_airdit.

PARAMETERS:p_file TYPE localfile.

DATA:ls_documentdata TYPE bapi_doc_draw2,
lt_text TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bapi_doc_drat,
lt_files TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bapi_doc_files2,
lt_objectlinks TYPE TABLE OF bapi_doc_drad,
lt_binary_tab TYPE TABLE OF sdokcntbin,
lt_drao TYPE TABLE OF drao,
lt_file TYPE TABLE OF cvapi_doc_file,
ls_file TYPE cvapi_doc_file,
ls_xstring TYPE xstring,
lv_length TYPE i,
lv_filename TYPE string,
lv_doctype TYPE dokar VALUE 'ZIP',
lv_docnum TYPE doknr,
lv_docpart TYPE doktl_d VALUE '000',
lv_docver TYPE dokvr VALUE '00',
ls_return TYPE bapiret2,
ls_file1 TYPE bapi_doc_files2,
lt_file1 TYPE TABLE OF bapi_doc_files2.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON VALUE-REQUEST FOR p_file.
CALL FUNCTION 'F4_FILENAME'
EXPORTING
program_name = syst-cprog
dynpro_number = syst-dynnr
IMPORTING
file_name = p_file.
lv_filename = p_file.

START-OF-SELECTION.

CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_UPLOAD'
EXPORTING
filename = lv_filename
IMPORTING
filelength = lv_length
TABLES
data_tab = lt_binary_tab
EXCEPTIONS
file_open_error = 1
file_read_error = 2
no_batch = 3
gui_refuse_filetransfer = 4
invalid_type = 5
no_authority = 6
unknown_error = 7
bad_data_format = 8
header_not_allowed = 9
separator_not_allowed = 10
header_too_long = 11
unknown_dp_error = 12
access_denied = 13
dp_out_of_memory = 14
disk_full = 15
dp_timeout = 16
OTHERS = 17.

ls_file-filename = 'test_dms.pdf'.
ls_file-storage_cat = 'ZCDV'.
ls_file-dappl = 'PDF'.
ls_file-description = 'Measuring Document'.
ls_file-checked_in = 'X'.
ls_file-dttrg = 'Default'.
ls_file-langu = sy-langu.
ls_file-active_version = 'X'.
ls_file-created_at = sy-datum.
ls_file-created_by = sy-uname.
ls_file-updateflag = ' '.
APPEND ls_file TO lt_file.

lt_text = VALUE #( ( language = sy-langu language_iso = sy-langu description = 'Measuring Document' ) ).

lt_objectlinks = VALUE #( ( objecttype = 'IMRG' objectkey = '00000000000000000532' ) ).

ls_documentdata-documenttype = 'ZIP'.
ls_documentdata-documentpart = '000'.
ls_documentdata-documentversion = '00'.
ls_documentdata-createdate = sy-datum.
ls_documentdata-createdate = sy-datum.
ls_documentdata-username = sy-uname.
ls_documentdata-description = 'Measuring Document'.
ls_documentdata-wsapplication1 = 'PDF'.
ls_documentdata-wsapplication2 = 'PDF'.
ls_documentdata-statusextern = 'CR'.


CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_DOCUMENT_CREATE2'
EXPORTING
documentdata = ls_documentdata
IMPORTING
documentnumber = lv_docnum
documentpart = lv_docpart
documenttype = lv_doctype
documentversion = lv_docver
return = ls_return
TABLES
objectlinks = lt_objectlinks
documentdescriptions = lt_text.

IF ls_return-type = 'E'.
ROLLBACK WORK.
ELSE.
COMMIT WORK.
ENDIF.

DATA:ls_api_cntl TYPE cvapi_api_control,
ls_msg TYPE messages,
ls_status TYPE cvapi_doc_status.
ls_api_cntl-no_update_task = 'X'.
ls_api_cntl-commit_flag = 'X'.
ls_api_cntl-save_flag = 'X'.
ls_api_cntl-load_flag = 'X'.
ls_api_cntl-init_text = 'X'.
ls_api_cntl-bapi_flag = 'X'.
ls_status-dokst = 'CR'.

LOOP AT lt_binary_tab INTO DATA(ls_binary_tab).
DATA(ls_drao) = VALUE drao( dokar = lv_doctype
doknr = lv_docnum " This will create DIR Number
dokvr = lv_docver
doktl = lv_docpart
appnr = '1'
zaehl = sy-tabix
orblk = ls_binary_tab-line
orln = lv_length
orbkl = 2550
).
APPEND ls_drao TO lt_drao.
CLEAR: ls_drao.
ENDLOOP.

IF lv_docnum IS NOT INITIAL.
CALL FUNCTION 'CVAPI_DOC_CHECKIN'
DESTINATION 'NONE'
EXPORTING
pf_dokar = lv_doctype
pf_doknr = lv_docnum
pf_dokvr = lv_docver
pf_doktl = lv_docpart
ps_doc_status = ls_status
pf_ftp_dest = 'SAPFTPA'
pf_http_dest = 'SAPHTTPA'
pf_hostname = 'DEFAULT'
ps_api_control = ls_api_cntl
pf_replace = 'X'
pf_content_provide = 'TBL' "TBL – takes data from a table of binary data (lt_binary_tab)
IMPORTING
psx_message = ls_msg
TABLES
pt_files_x = lt_file
pt_content = lt_drao.

IF ls_msg-msg_type CA 'EA'.
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_ROLLBACK'.
ELSE.

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
EXPORTING
wait = abap_true.

ENDIF.
ENDIF.
write : 'Document number :', lv_docnum.

entry.title: Re: Public cloud interface development
entry.content: Dear Ivan-san,

entry.title: How to call class in BW transformations
entry.content:
Hi ABAP Cloud Experts.

I would like to know, How to call Class in the BW transformations. I have created a class where it will give the output as Current date. I would like to use this class in BW transformations and along with other data, System date should display for all records.

Please find the sample code.

CLASS zsample11 DEFINITION
PUBLIC
FINAL
CREATE PUBLIC .

PUBLIC SECTION.
INTERFACES if_oo_adt_classrun.
PROTECTED SECTION.
PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS zsample11 IMPLEMENTATION.
METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.
out->write( cl_abap_context_info=>get_system_date( ) ).
ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Public cloud interface development
entry.content:
Dear Ivan-san,

Thank you for your prompt reply; it was indeed helpful and has provided clarity for us.

To confirm my understanding of your explanation, it seems that it may be possible to establish a connection with S4H Cloud from the customer's private domain on AWS using Tier3 Classic ABAP technology while adhering to the core clean restriction, albeit not being recommended.

Additionally, I would like to inquire about networking and security technologies below the application layer perspective. Specifically, how can we establish connections with lower layers such as the session layer, the network layer, and other layers beneath the application layer?

I am concerned that this may necessitate some form of specialized technical arrangement between both SAP's gateway and the customer's gateway.

Thank you once again for your assistance.
Regards,
Takashi

entry.title: Manufacture Part Number visibility in VSS Screens
entry.content:
Hi All,

Our organization recently underwent a SAP implementation process and currently utilizes the Vehicle Sales Service Dealer Management System (DMS). Initially, a decision was made by management to use internal SAP part numbers without the Manufacturer Part Number (MPN), resulting in most VSS screens not displaying the MPN.

Example:

 

Considering our company's primary focus on vehicle aftersales, there's a growing need among end-users to display the Manufacturer Part Number (MPN) on their screens. This is because item descriptions often lack clarity in identifying the correct part. The MPN serves as an intelligent number, facilitating easier identification. The solution offered by the Application team involves using MB51, but this requires entering each item individually. In a real working environment, this process can be time-consuming.

From the users they have requested to display in the VSS Screens in the below columns.

So; in this case;

Are there any alternative solutions available?

What are the potential outcomes if we proceed with this change request?

Have any other automotive companies experienced similar situations?

entry.title: Issue with Active Ingredient Calculation
entry.content:
I'm trying to understand how to work with active ingredients. I have tried to setup a demo with sample materials. For an API material I've defined in the material master as 95 KAI = 100 Kg. I've maintained BOM with 200 KAI of active ingredient for 1000kg of the header material.

 When I check the recipe, it shows as 200 KAI. For the filler material I've maintained the formula as [001,001]-CQSM(002;002)

 But when I create a process order for 1000 Kg, the API quantity gets reduced to 190 on its own.

 I've maintained the proportion unit this way in the material master.

entry.title: CDS View for Planned Values & Actual Values
entry.content:
Hi Community Experts,

We are looking for a CDS View for our Customer Projects which would help us to get Planned Values and Actual Values subjected to all the projects we have. We tried using - "C_SlsPerfPlanActualQuery" but this CDS view is not yet released and again we are not able to derive this requirement. 

There is SAP Standard Analytical Query App which gives us the fields "Planned Revenue" and "Billed Revenue" which we can consider as "Planned Value and Actual Value". But we are trying create a report which would give the order backlog of these value (i.e Planned Value - Actual Value) and hence we cannot use this Standard report directly. 

If any community experts has more information or idea on this it would be helpful.

Thanks & Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Manufacture Part Number visibility in VSS Screens
entry.content:
Hi All,

Our organization recently underwent a SAP implementation process and currently utilizes the Vehicle Sales Service Dealer Management System (DMS). Initially, a decision was made by management to use internal SAP part numbers without the Manufacturer Part Number (MPN), resulting in most VSS screens not displaying the MPN.

Example:

 

Considering our company's primary focus on vehicle aftersales, there's a growing need among end-users to display the Manufacturer Part Number (MPN) on their screens. This is because item descriptions often lack clarity in identifying the correct part. The MPN serves as an intelligent number, facilitating easier identification. The solution offered by the Application team involves using MB51, but this requires entering each item individually. In a real working environment, this process can be time-consuming.

From the users they have requested to display in the VSS Screens in the below columns.

 

So; in this case;

Are there any alternative solutions available?

What are the potential outcomes if we proceed with this change request?

Have any other automotive companies experienced similar situations?

entry.title: Re: Question on Solution Manager 7.2 CCLM User CC_ALL_SID
entry.content: Hello , May I ask if the following is what you want? https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/dfb02462c453431eaf249aad96f004f8/d7d7fb56d7e4124ce10000000a4450e5.html You can edit objects in SM_WORKCENTER -> Custom Code Management -> Access Custom Code Library (objects) Best regards, Leo SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Can SAP CCO read the bar code which might contain the...
entry.content:
Same question here. I am trying to read the price from the barcode but I can't find any resources on how to do that. 
As for quantity, this worked for me:

   @PluginAt(method = "addSalesItemToReceipt", pluginClass = ReceiptPosService.class, where = POSITION.BEFORE)
    public void beforeAddSalesItemToReceipt(Object caller, Object[] args, Object stack) {
    if (runok) {
   
        if (forcedQuantity.get() != null) {
            //Check the ThreadLocal which was set earlier. If a price was set, then the forth parameter is changed accordingly, since this holds the price for the sales item
            args[4] = forcedQuantity.get();
        }
    }
    }

Where 
private ThreadLocal<BigDecimal> forcedQuantity = new ThreadLocal<>();
forcedQuantity.set(new BigDecimal(quantity));

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 4
entry.content: Excellent! This is how we all learn... by reading other's code. We are so lucky nowadays... when we have places like GitHub where we can go and read tons of good quality code.

entry.title: Is it possible to add own international address version in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi there

2189610 - How to activate and create country specific International address version? - SAP for Me

As above, in classic ECC it is possible to add own international address version, and I would like to confirm whether it is available or not in S/4HANA public cloud.

I  checked the help page of international address version for S4HC below, and my understanding is that we can only activate the versions which provided as standard setting, and cannot add our own versions.

International Address Versions | SAP Help Portal

I appreciate your support.

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: [BUG] blog shows up under untagged tag
entry.content:
Hi @audreystevenson, now it has completely broken down. None of the posts have the SAP Business One tag:

Also, in case it is related, the SAP Business One tag page is very slow to open. In fact it has been for a while now.

entry.title: SAP - Connectors give Invalid URL error when trying to call the API endpoint.
entry.content:
I'm implementing connector to our external system using SAP connectors. I have set up all the required fields including the base url. I have created and resource and I'm trying to try it executing, and getting this error,

{"requestId":"66050540e4b0579815d6b4a3","providerErrorCode":400,"message":"Bad Request","providerMessage":"<HTML><HEAD>
<TITLE>Invalid URL</TITLE>
</HEAD><BODY>
<H1>Invalid URL</H1>
The requested URL "http://%5bNo%20Host%5d/rest/310/OrderDetail", is invalid.<p>
Reference #9.974ddb17.1711605056.4c8c89fa
</BODY></HTML>
"}

I can notice that "Host" in the url, is this supposed to be resolved automatically ? Or is that the problem ? I mean when decoded this URL it becomes like this,

http://[No Host]/rest/310/OrderDetail?

I do not understand how this "Host" is resolved to my base url. Can someone please help ?

Note : I have some pre-request hooks to modify the headers as once of the server requirement.

 

 

Thanks.Dilan

entry.title: Reading an attribute value one Dim1 member, where the Dim1 member is an attribute of another dim2
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

In SAC model, we have Material dimension, and it has a text attribute: FreightCode,

We have another dimension called FreightCode, and it has a numeric attribute called: FreightCost

In the Data Action, for a material, how can we get the FreightCost for the matching FeightCode. 

This is static (master data) hence we would like to work through dimensions. 

There are 1000s of materials, and only 20 Freight Codes, so that when a FreightCost changes, it applies to all the materials that share the same FreightCode.

Thanks,

SP9

entry.title: Re: Receiver XI adapter in SAP CPI
entry.content: Hi This flow is from CPI to SAP S4 HANA system, so no where used OAuth2 authentication

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to add own international address versi...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

your understanding is correct - in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition you cannot create your own customer specific address version.

Best regards,

Nils Buerckel

entry.title: How to set the overall status of a Value Contract to "In Process" after creating a Subsequent Order?
entry.content:
The overall status of a value contract remains as "Open" , how can this be set to "In Process".


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to set the overall status of a Value Contract to...
entry.content:
• There are only two statue values that a Value Contract can be in, these are Open and Completed.
  • For a value contract to be set as completed, the user must set a reason for rejection.
  • To set the rejection reason:

    1. Open the Manage Sales Contract App.
    2. Open the relevant Value Contract.
    3. Click the change button.
    4. Select the line item of the contract.
    5. Press the Display items details button, which , on the screen, is located above the words "All Items".
    6. Once the item screen opens navigate to the Status tab.
    7. In the processing status, navigate to the Overall Status dropdown field.
    8. Select a reason in the Overall status.
    9. Click Save.
    10. Complete this for the other items if necessary.
    11. The overall status for the contract will now change from Open to Completed.

entry.title: 【Question】About using service requests of SAP for Me for public cloud environments
entry.content:
Hi everyone.

I'm using the public cloud edition.

When should I use SAP for Me service requests?

When using Private Edition, I used service requests for client copy and deletion.

Is there a case to use a service request in the public edition?

If so, please tell me when to use it.

Regards.

entry.title: Access to Prod from QA Test system
entry.content:
Dear Guys ,

How to access data in prod from QA Test system?

entry.title: Re: Delta extraction of ADSO from SAP BW bridge into SAP Datasphere via Transformation Flow
entry.content:
Hello @wilson_kurian3 

Wow, really helpful Blog. So far I have not yet worked with an ABAP Bridge, but somehow my feeling while reading was: "Oh! I assumed so far that the BW Bridge is similar to BW4 and that extracting data from a Changelog - even if into SAP Datasphere - would be the same like within BW?!

Did you also test the behaviour of a key figure?

If your DSO contains a value 100, and you update it to 50. I assume the Extraction table will not contain two records, -100 and +50, it will only contain one record with 50. Right?

BR, Martin

entry.title: Account member formula isn't working
entry.content:
Hello! I have an issue regarding the account dimension and formulas within it. I have an account member that is meant to lookup a value from another account member. When I created the formula it worked in the preview but no matter what filters I set in the story the value of the account member unbooked and nothing appears. I changed the structure priority to the account dimension as well. I then changed it so that instead of using lookup I utilised RESTRICT() but it still did not work. I then found out that the IF statement i was using was preventing my script from functioning correctly But I need it in order to classify a dimension value. 

As you can see the Account dimension i am trying to utilise is called Service Charges Per person(SC_PER_PERSON) and copy the values from service charges into the SC_PER_PERSON account member. But in the table only service charges show and SC_PER_PERSON will not appear as the table is set to booked only and there are no values in the member(I checked using unbooked)

Any help at all would Be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Access to Prod from QA Test system
entry.content:
How to access data in prod from QA Test system?

#Sap , # QA , # Prod , # Access

entry.title: Different Integration Option based on Company Code(Ariba B&I)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are going to implement Ariba B&I for ABC and XYZ company.
Company ABC has SAP, and we are planning to integrate data via Managed Gateway.
For the other company XYZ, their backend is not SAP. So, we cannot integrate via Managed Gateway.

In this situation, we want to stop integrating XYZ data to ABC company's SAP.
Is there any way to achieve this requirement without middleware?

Thank you for your inputs.
